Bash(git -C /Users/bwelner/projects/nn-library commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add RWT × N/N-N integration layer

Integrates N/N-N Logic as a metacognitive convergence signal for the
Ralph Wiggum Technique \(iterative LLM refinement loop\). Three convergence
strategies \(Diff, Nu, Hybrid\) with a MetacognitionBridge that maps LLM
self-assessments to N/N-N evidence. Key behavioral test validates that
Hybrid catches premature convergence that Diff misses. 177 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

improvement, stuck, oscillation\) with actual ν trajectories and
iteration counts across all three convergence strategies.

EOF
\)")
